candidates.why: Component of operating revenue but not the main consolidated total; keep as potential fallback but prefer explicit total revenue line.
Specific revenue component; not the aggregate top-line, but could be used as fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Non-Recurring Income related to DRU contracts
candidates.why: Non-recurring income component, not core recurring revenue; not ideal as main REVT.
Revenue-type line but specific to rentals; not the consolidated top-line.
Generic revenue line; semantically correct as top-line and may be used in some years.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating all revenue components; best representation of top-line sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be primary REVT but is in candidate list.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT primary mapping.
Investment income, not core sales revenue.
Finance income; not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Interest Income related to DRU contracts
candidates.why: Specific finance income; not total sales.
Likely small or ancillary operating revenue; could be fallback but not main aggregate given presence of Total Revenue.
Tax line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow hedges, reclassification to income statement
candidates.why: OCI reclassification, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Deferred tax of cash flw hedges, reclassifiation to income statement
candidates.why: Tax effect of OCI; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrual, not the P&L flow; not suitable as REVT main line.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet contract asset; not the revenue flow.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet contract liability; not revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clearest aggregate top-line; Revenue and Operating revenue are included as alternates in case of label changes over time.

candidates.why: Appears to be a broad operating expense bucket that includes SG&A and possibly depreciation; too aggregated for pure COGS when more specific cost of goods lines exist.
Specifically labeled as cost of goods and services; best representation of COGS.
Likely SG&A/overhead rather than direct production costs.
Residual operating expenses; more overhead-like than direct COGS.
Specific operating cost, but not main COGS; could be part of SG&A.
Explicit SG&A; should not be mapped as COGS.
Residual operating expenses; overhead not direct COGS.
Generic overhead expenses; not specific COGS.
Label suggests direct material and service costs related to production; appropriate as COGS component.
Financial, not operating cost; not COGS.
Financial, not operating cost; not COGS.
Mixed income/expense line; not pure COGS.
Finance-related lease expense, not production COGS.
Inventory asset, not P&L expense line; not used for COGS mapping.

candidates.row_label: Accrued operating expenses and other liabilities
candidates.why: Liability accrual not the expense flow; not suitable as COGS.

variables.notes: Direct production-related cost lines are used for COGS; broader operating expense and SG&A buckets are excluded.

candidates.why: Broad operating expense bucket that likely includes SG&A, but we prefer more specific SG&A line when present.
Overhead-type operating expenses; valid SG&A component if no explicit SG&A line available.
Personnel cost, a classic SG&A component.
Residual operating expenses; likely SG&A-type overhead.
Explicit SG&A line; per rules, when populated this should be the sole SG&A mapping.
Generic overhead label; SG&A-like if needed as component.
Mixed line; contains both income and expenses, so less clean as SG&A component.
Typical SG&A component if presented as expense.

candidates.row_label: Accrued operating expenses and other liabilities
candidates.why: Liability accrual for operating expenses, not the P&L itself; normally not used as SG&A component mapping.

variables.notes: An explicit populated SG&A line exists; per hierarchy, only this row is used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; best match for XRD.
Capitalized development costs on balance sheet; not the expense itself.
Gross capitalized development costs; again, not the expense line.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized development costs; related but not the current period R&D expense line.

variables.notes: R&D expense is taken directly from the explicit income statement line rather than balance sheet development cost accounts.

candidates.why: Specific category of interest expense; valid as an alternative label for interest costs.
Net interest expense on borrowings; strong candidate for interest expense mapping.
Interest portion of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Interest capitalized to assets; not an expense in the period’s P&L, so secondary relevance for XINT.
Equity allocation, not interest expense.
Equity allocation, not interest expense.
Generic interest expense line; primary choice when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of interest on lease liabilities; valid alternative interest expense label.
Asset, not expense; not suitable for XINT.
Asset, not expense.
Asset, not expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided as a priority list so later processing can pick the first available per year.

candidates.why: Income from associates, not an equity balance; unsuitable for BE.
Earnings from equity-accounted investees; not equity itself.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Describes income attribution, not the balance sheet equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Share of OCI from equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Refers to comprehensive income attribution, not the equity balance line.
Investment asset, not shareholders’ equity.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; acceptable but not ideal when a parent-only equity line is available.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Akastor ASA
candidates.why: Explicit parent/owners’ equity line, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Akastor ASA

variables.notes: Parent equity is used for BE to avoid double-counting non-controlling interests which are captured separately in MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit; not the balance sheet minority equity, but confirms presence of NCI concept.
Same as non-controlling interests in income statement; flows not stock.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for the same concept; included as fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not the equity balance; not used for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income; not the minority equity balance.

variables.notes: Minority interest is taken from balance sheet equity lines; income statement allocations are not used for the MIB balance.
